I think the key words to focus on are in the opening paragraph! "Natural Process"
What happening now is not a natural process! 2500 of the worlds leading experts can't be wrong! 90% cretinty that humans are now changing the climate and the worlds natural systems faster than any other time in the history or time!

Thanks for last night! Really enjoyed.

D
Sent from my BlackBerry® wireless device

-----Original Message-----
From: kellens@earthlink.net
Date: Fri, 23 Mar 2007 10:15:26 -0400 (GMT-04:00)
To:David de Rothschild dmdr1@mac.com
Subject: From Jeffrey..

Jeffrey wanted me to pass this on to you..

"sorry I said 90% , the figure is actually higher...sorry.

Extinction can be a natural process. When the environment changes, as when the Ice
Age came 100,000 years ago, animals find themselves no longer adapted to the environment.
Their habitat has changed, even disappeared, but their needs have not. So they die.
Life on Earth is a history of extinctions, for about 98% of the living things that
so far have lived on Earth are gone now. Dinosaurs and pterodactyls, woolly mammoths
and saber-toothed cats — they are all gone.
Luckily, fossils preserve information about many extinct living things. We find
bones, footprints, eggs, skin impressions, and more, and are able to see the changes
in life on Earth over time"
